use ignore::overrides::OverrideBuilder;

fn build_overrides(root: &str, pattern: &str) -> Result<ignore::overrides::Override, String> {
    let mut builder = OverrideBuilder::new(root);
    builder.add(pattern).map_err(|e| format!("invalid pattern: {}", e))?;
    builder.build().map_err(|e| format!("failed to build overrides: {}", e))
}
